task_objective: Review codebase, update documentation, screenshots, and use cases
design_decisions: Added 'Use Cases' section to README.md to showcase real-world applicability.
Updated screenshots using a realistic 100k-row synthetic dataset.
Added cacheBuster to image URLs in README.md to bypass GitHub's image cache.
Added 'psutil' to dependencies in pyproject.toml as it is required by the memory module.
Updated run.sh to correctly include the virtual environment in the PATH.
Updated existing examples in examples/ directory to reflect current v0.1.23+ features.
Added 'Project Structure & Examples' section to README.md with live report links via raw.githack.com.
results: README.md is now up-to-date with the latest features (v0.1.7+), including use cases and improved parameter documentation. Screenshots are fresh and reflect the current UI state.
